character_block: CHARACTER CONSISTENCY: East Asian woman operator age 25 in light blue factory uniform and blue safety cap. East Asian male engineer age 30 with thin rectangular glasses and navy blue engineer uniform. Never looking at camera. Photorealistic Apple commercial style, clean modern manufacturing, soft natural morning light, 16:9 cinematic, no text overlays, no logos, no watermarks.

scenes.voice: Every day... manufacturing teams face production issues that demand fast decisions.
scenes.prompt: Wide cinematic slow dolly forward shot of a modern inkjet printer manufacturing factory. Clean white and gray production floor, multiple parallel conveyor belts with white and black inkjet printers at assembly stages. Six to eight operators in light blue uniforms working at stations. One engineer in navy blue uniform walking down the center aisle away from camera. White robotic arms on the right. Large windows on the left with bright morning sunlight, polished reflective floor, deep depth of field.
scenes.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, blurry, low quality, text, watermark, logo, people looking at camera, unsafe behavior

scenes.voice: Engineers spend valuable time... searching through SOPs... historical reports... and company knowledge...
scenes.prompt: Over-the-shoulder cinematic shot from behind a manufacturing engineer sitting at a modern desk inside a factory office. Three monitors: left shows quality dashboard with charts, center shows PDF SOP technical document, right shows Excel spreadsheet with historical defect data. Engineer has hand on chin thinking with slightly concerned expression. Glass partition behind shows blurred factory floor. Warm office lighting with cool monitor glow. Slow zoom in.
scenes.negative_prompt: cartoon, blurry, text on screen readable, watermark, logo, facing camera

scenes.voice: Before they can even begin solving the problem... While production waits... Every minute matters. What if AI could become another engineer on your team?
scenes.prompt: Close-up cinematic shot of a stopped inkjet printer production line. White inkjet printer still on conveyor belt. Yellow warning light blinking on nearby control panel. Two operators in blue uniforms beside the line looking at each other with concerned expressions. Engineer in navy blue uniform in background with hand on head thinking. Tense atmosphere, slightly dimmer lighting, shallow depth of field. Slow horizontal pan.
scenes.negative_prompt: cartoon, blurry, watermark, logo, people looking at camera, chaos

scenes.voice: Meet Buek Core. A platform designed to build AI Workers... for any industry.
scenes.notes: Hero + slow scroll, English UI, not logged in

scenes.voice: Instead of creating a different AI for every business... Buek Core separates AI reasoning... from domain knowledge.
scenes.notes: Infographic: AI CORE → Knowledge → 4 industries, stagger 0.8s

scenes.voice: Every user has a dedicated workspace based on their role. Operators focus on keeping production running. Engineers investigate production issues and identify root causes. Supervisors review findings and approve corrective actions. Plant Managers monitor operational performance through real-time executive insights.

shots.prompt: Medium cinematic shot at a modern automotive assembly line. East Asian woman operator age 26 in light blue factory uniform, blue safety cap, white gloves, standing beside a conveyor with car parts. She interacts with an industrial touchscreen panel showing production dashboard metrics. She taps Quality Check on screen. Soft morning factory light, slow pan right. Photorealistic, never looking at camera, no logos, no readable text on screen.
shots.negative_prompt: cartoon, blurry, watermark, logo, facing camera, unsafe behavior

shots.prompt: Over-the-shoulder cinematic shot of East Asian male manufacturing engineer age 32 with thin rectangular glasses, navy blue engineering uniform, sitting at desk in factory office. Laptop shows engineering investigation workspace with charts and SOP documents. Production floor visible through glass behind him. Slow push in toward laptop. Coffee cup and notebook on desk. Never looking at camera. Photorealistic Apple commercial style.
shots.negative_prompt: cartoon, blurry, readable screen text, watermark, logo, facing camera

shots.prompt: Close-up cinematic shot of East Asian male production supervisor age 42 in supervisor uniform holding tablet in factory office area. Tablet shows investigation approval dashboard. His finger taps Approve button. Focus on hands and tablet. Blurred production floor in background. Professional lighting, shallow depth of field. Never looking at camera.
shots.negative_prompt: cartoon, blurry, readable text, watermark, logo, facing camera

shots.prompt: Wide cinematic shot of executive meeting room in manufacturing plant. East Asian male plant manager age 50 in white shirt and dark blue blazer stands before large wall display showing executive KPI dashboard with production charts. He gestures while discussing with engineer in background. Slow dolly in. Professional, confident mood. Never looking at camera. Photorealistic.
shots.negative_prompt: cartoon, blurry, readable dashboard text, watermark, logo, facing camera

scenes.notes: Screen recordings per role + optional Veo B-roll composited in CapCut. For communicative 2×2 infographic: node render_scene_07_infographic.mjs
